title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nykaa Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nykaa Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail:
Nykaa Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail!
